title: Celebrating The Unwavering Strength of Nigerian Breweries Plc Brands With Emmanuel Oriakhi - FinancialEDGE

html:
Emmanuel Oriakhi, Marketing Director of Nigerian Breweries Plc, was in attendance at the company’s 2024 financial and operational update, where he shared insights into the company’s brands performance.

Oriakhi highlighted the company’s brands resilience in the face of economic challenges, underscoring its commitment to innovation, customer satisfaction, and sustainability.

The update provided stakeholders with a comprehensive review of the company’s financial and operational achievements, demonstrating its growth and progress in the Nigerian market.

 

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Emmanuel Oriakhi, Marketing Director of Nigerian Breweries Plc and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge  at the sideline of Nigerian Breweries Plc 2024 financial and operational performance update in Lagos.
